view.title: Survey Digital Cove {id}
view.welcomeEmailConfirm: Are ye sure ye want to resend the welcome dispatch?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome dispatch has been resent. Check yer crow's nest.

buyIp.title: Purchase Additional Ship's Coordinates Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Doubloons ({symbol}) every moon cycle as yer cove be plundered
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional Ship's Coordinates doubloons: {symbol}{cost}/moon cycle. Are ye sure ye want to order additional Ship's Coordinates?

migration.title: Sail Yer Cove to New Waters
migration.registeredUsername: Registered Pirate Handle / Message Bottle / ID
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the cove be live and weathering heavy traffic, can we set a holding page during the voyage?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this cove have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do ye also want us to help ye transfer the named port registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do ye want us to update the port navigation servers as soon as we finish the cargo migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this form will open a new grievance for our ship's officers to begin yer voyage.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical voyage is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of cargo to haul be large.
migration.note4: The old cove needs to be sailing and accessible while we are performing the voyage, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on yer cove while we perform the voyage, otherwise those cargo may not be hauled to the new cove.
